name: org.machanism.machai:bindex-core
description: bindex-core provides core functionality for MachAI Bindex metadata management, including AI-assisted generation and update of bindex.json files, registration of Bindex documents into a MongoDB-backed registry, and semantic (vector) retrieval of relevant libraries using classification embeddings. It builds prompts from a Bindex JSON schema plus project context (Maven pom.xml with selected source/resource files, JavaScript package.json plus src tree, Python pyproject.toml plus inferred source directory), supports incremental updates via an origin Bindex, and can optionally log provider inputs under .machai. It exposes function tools for LLM workflows to retrieve a registered Bindex by id (get_bindex) and to retrieve the Bindex JSON schema (get_bindex_schema). Core components include BindexCreator (create/update bindex.json), BindexBuilderFactory with builders (MavenBindexBuilder, JScriptBindexBuilder, PythonBindexBuilder), BindexRegister (register local bindex.json), BindexRepository (MongoDB persistence primitives), Picker (embedding generation, MongoDB vector search with language/layer filters, and dependency expansion), and ApplicationAssembly (deterministic prompt assembly from selected Bindexes and optional input logging).

constructors.description: Creates a processor that can generate or update a project's bindex.json using an AI-assisted BindexBuilder selected from the project layout.

examples.description: Generate or update bindex.json for a project and write it to disk.

constructors.description: Creates a processor that registers an existing bindex.json into the MongoDB-backed registry via Picker.

examples.description: Register bindex.json for a project in the registry (overwrite if already present).

constructors.description: Creates a Picker capable of registering Bindexes and performing semantic retrieval using embeddings and MongoDB vector search.

examples.description: Classify a query and retrieve relevant Bindexes using vector search.

constructors.description: Creates an application assembly runner that builds a deterministic prompt conversation using selected Bindexes and executes it against a configured GenAI provider.

examples.description: Assemble provider inputs from selected Bindexes and execute the provider.

features.name: Generate or update bindex.json
features.description: Generates or updates a project's bindex.json file using an AI-assisted builder selected for the detected project layout. Can optionally use an existing origin Bindex for incremental updates and can log provider inputs to .machai.

features.name: Register bindex in MongoDB registry
features.description: Reads bindex.json from a project directory and registers it in the MongoDB-backed registry using Picker, inserting or updating the stored document and its embedding vector.

examples.description: Register the local bindex.json in the registry.

features.name: Semantic retrieval (vector search) of Bindexes
features.description: Classifies a free-text query into one or more Classification objects, generates embeddings, performs MongoDB vector search filtered by language and Clean Architecture layer, and returns matching Bindex documents (plus expanded dependencies where applicable).

examples.description: Retrieve Bindexes relevant to a query using vector search.

features.name: Retrieve bindex metadata by id (function tool)
features.description: LLM function tool implementation that retrieves a registered Bindex by id from the MongoDB-backed repository and returns it as a JSON string (or the literal null when not found).

examples.description: Tool arguments used to request a Bindex by id.

features.name: Retrieve bindex JSON schema (function tool)
features.description: LLM function tool implementation that returns the Bindex JSON schema resource content as a JSON string.

features.name: Assemble prompt inputs using selected Bindexes
features.description: Builds a deterministic provider conversation consisting of system instructions, assembly instructions, user prompt, and a recommended library section derived from selected Bindexes; optionally logs inputs to .machai/assembly-inputs.txt and executes the provider.

examples.snippet:
new org.machanism.machai.bindex.ApplicationAssembly("openai", config, layout.getProjectDir())
    .assembly("Create a minimal sample that uses the selected libraries", selectedBindexes);
examples.description: Assemble and run an LLM workflow with selected library context.
